bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueD offer that is worst for me. To avoid simply repeating my previous exact bid while still protecting my high-weight issues, I concede only on the lowest-weight issueD.

I am targeting a high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.04, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered the same all-valueD bid, which is very low utility for me and shows no concession pattern. To avoid repeating my last bid while making only a small early concession, I am conceding further only on the lowest-weight issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is little need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has only slightly improved their offer to me by moving issueA from valueD to valueC, but they remain far from acceptable; I will concede only on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.87 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has only slightly improved their offers to me by moving issueA from valueD to valueC while keeping the rest at valueD, so they appear mostly firm; I will concede on lower-weight issues first while holding issueA and issueB at my best values.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid and avoiding deeper concessions while the opponent has only moved from all valueD to valueC on issueA and then held firm. Their offers are still low utility to me, so I will keep my most important issues at valueA and concede only the least important issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.866 because it is still early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has begun conceding on issueA from valueD to valueB, but is still holding firm on issueB/C/D; I will hold my most important issues A and B at valueA while conceding on lower-weight issueC and issueD.

I targeted a still-high utility offer around 0.81 because it is early in the negotiation, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has improved only on issueA while holding issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueD, so I am keeping my strongest issues A and B at valueA while conceding further on lower-weight issueC and already leaving issueD at valueD.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held very low-utility offers for me, with only limited movement on issueA/issueB, so I will keep my high-weight issues A and B at valueA and vary the lower-weight concessions to avoid simply repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866, since the negotiation is still early at t=0.18 and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held very low-value offers for me, with only limited movement on issueA or issueB, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight issueD and moderately on issueC.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.89 because it is still early at t=0.20, so there is no need to make deep concessions yet. The opponent has started conceding on issueA, but continues pushing low values on the other issues, so I will hold firm on the most important issues A and B while offering movement on lower-weight issues C and D.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.81 because we are only at t=0.22, so I should not concede heavily on the highest-weight issues yet. The opponent has mostly held very low offers for me, but they have shown occasional movement on issueA and most recently issueC, so I will hold firm on issueA and issueB while conceding on lower-weight issueC and issueD to make the bid more acceptable.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.79, since it is early-mid negotiation time and there is no need to drop near the opponent’s low offers yet. The opponent has made only limited concessions, with their latest bid improving issueA and issueB somewhat but still keeping issueC and issueD at low values for me, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A and B while conceding more on lower-weight issues C and D.

I am targeting a solid utility around 0.76, since it is still early-mid negotiation and there is no need to concede on my highest-weight issues yet. The opponent has mostly held issueC and issueD at valueD while slowly testing concessions on issueA/issueB, so I am conceding the lower-weight issues C and D while holding firm on A and B.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.73 while making a meaningful but controlled concession because we are only at t=0.28. The opponent has mostly held near valueD-heavy offers, with occasional movement on issueA and issueB, so I will keep my highest-weight issueA at valueA while conceding some on issueB and lower-weight issues to test for acceptance.

At t=0.30 I am still targeting a relatively high utility bid, since there is ample time left and the opponent’s offers remain low for me despite small concessions on issueA and issueC. I will hold firm on the most important issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight issues C and D to keep the offer plausible without dropping too far.

I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.73, conceding on lower/medium-weight issues while still holding firm on the most important issueA. The opponent has gradually moved from all valueD to offers including issueA:valueC/valueB and recently issueB:valueB, so I am using their signaled flexibility on issueB while avoiding a full late-game concession this early at t=0.32.

At t=0.34 I am still targeting a relatively high utility bid, around 0.78, because there is time left but we should show some movement. The opponent has conceded only modestly and inconsistently, with their best offers to me still low, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueA while making concessions on issueB and issueD and avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.73 while making a noticeable concession from my last offer, mainly on lower-weight issueC and issueD. The opponent has repeatedly pushed valueD on issueC/issueD and has only modestly improved offers to me, so I will keep my highest-weight issueA at valueA while conceding some ground elsewhere.

I am targeting a mid-high utility around 0.79 because we are still before the halfway point, so I should not make major concessions on high-weight issues yet. The opponent’s offers have improved only modestly for me and still keep many valueD positions, but they recently signaled some flexibility on issueC, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueC/issueD while protecting issueA and partially protecting issueB.

I am targeting a moderate mid-game utility around 0.69, preserving my highest-weight issueA at valueA while conceding on lower/mid-weight issues. The opponent has gradually moved from all valueD to offers including valueC/valueB and most recently valueC on A/B/C, so I am responding with a bid closer to their pattern without giving up my core priority too early.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.66, conceding further on lower-weight issues while protecting issueA, my most important issue. The opponent has gradually improved from all valueD toward some concessions, but their latest bid is still only about 0.41 utility for me, so I should not accept that level yet. I am making a new concession from my prior offer by moving issueC downward while keeping issueB at a moderate concession and issueD fully conceded.

At t=0.44 we are in the mid-game, so I am targeting a solid but not maximal utility bid around 0.68 rather than holding at all valueA. The opponent’s offers have gradually improved for me but still remain low; they seem especially reluctant on lower-weight issues C and D, so I concede those while holding firm on high-weight issueA and keeping issueB at a moderate value.
